data.name: Space Pussy Hunter
data.detailed_description:
Storyline

The year 2177. Earth has been destroyed and other planets are left trying to restore normal life. The galaxy is ruled by only three factions:

🌑Imperials - the dominant power.
🪐Rebels - fighting against the Imperials.
👽Faceless - inhabitants of planets who are against any government.

Hot 🍓 Content

Sexy and high quality renders: A chance to see strawberry content with different characters in the game.

Gameplay

Auto Battle System: You can pump up your ship's attack stats and increase your chances of winning.

Trade: Buy cheaper and sell higher.

Narrative: Deeper storyline.

Extra content: Colonize planets and unlock secret pictures.

Get in your ship and head out to meet your sexy adventures!

data.short_description: Space Pussy Hunter is a visual novel with RPG elements. Explore the galaxy, mine resources and meet beautiful girls.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：7.0a
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
